### Market position (inferred)

- Quantum Reality Capture is positioned in the niche segment of LiDAR imaging and scanning services, focusing on architectural imaging and as-built services [inferred from S8, S11, S12].

### Strategic priorities (inferred)

- Their recent partnership with XGRIDS suggests a focus on expanding technological offerings and collaboration in reality capture solutions [inferred from S1].
- Attendance at major industry events like New York Build Expo and R-CON 2026 indicates a strategy to increase visibility and possibly launch new products or services [inferred from S2].
- The hiring of a Director of Marketing and Business Development implies an emphasis on business growth and market penetration [inferred from S1].

### Technical / operational friction points (inferred)

- With a small team size, the use of advanced LiDAR scanning devices [inferred from S9] may present integration and scalability challenges, particularly as they expand their service offerings through partnerships or product launches.

### Notable absences (inferred)
